title: Indulgent Canadian Stone-Bowl
description: A rich, resinous one-pot Canadian dish featuring fines-herbes and cooked in a stone bowl on a binchotan grill. Perfect for a cozy dinner with friends.

ingredients.name: Fines Herbes Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of parsley, dill, and chives.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground pepper for best flavor.

instructions: Heat the binchotan charcoal grill to 400°F (200°C).
Prepare the fines herbes oil by mixing together parsley, dill, and chives in a small bowl.
In a large stone bowl, combine the wild rice, quinoa, sweet potato, cranberry beans, maple syrup, feta cheese, parsley, ginger, garlic, lemon zest, salt, and pepper.
Pour in the water and stir to combine.
Place the stone bowl on the binchotan charcoal grill and cook for 25 minutes.
Stir the mixture every 5 minutes to prevent burning.
After 25 minutes, remove the stone bowl from the grill and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley and lemon zest if desired.
